name: Brightlocal Product Overview
heading: __MISSING__
highlight_text: Who it is best for: Small-mid businesses, Agencies
product_overview_description:
Brightlocal is a full-fledged local marketing tool that competes head-on with LocalFalcon and Synup for its local analytics capabiltiies. They have some deep analytics, insights, and reporting features for agencies and multi-location brands. Unlike LocalFalcon, the platform covers many different use cases and features for local marketing apart from analytics.

Source: G2

Core Features

  • Focused on high-authority sites (e.g., Manta, Merchant Circle, Tupalo, Hotfrog, Superpages)
  • Dedicated team for creating and optimizing listings on authoritative sites
  • Permanent citation ownership without recurring fees
  • Real-time updates for major platforms (Google, Apple Maps, Facebook, Bing)
  • A streamlined process for establishing and maintaining accurate listings
  • Authority Layer for foundational citations
  • Engagement Layer for high-visibility platforms
  • Combination of expert intervention and API-driven updates
  • Emphasis on authoritative sites for maximum SEO impact

What’s great

✅Stellar insights into competitors and your own local performance

✅Manual submissions ensure you have better control over your listings.

✅Reputation management tool to keep you on top and attract positive feedback from customers

✅Ensures permanent ownership of your listings

✅Highly visual reporting with powerful analytics and insight-capturing capabilities that helps agencies/resellers communicate their results better

What’s not great

❌Although reporting is on fleek, customers reported issues with data accuracy when it comes to Brightlocal’s analytics. 

❌The navigation and UI of the dashboards can also be made more user-friendly and less cluttered by multiple reports.

Pricing

Brightlocal offers a 14-day free trial for all of their plans. If billed monthly, the pricing starts at $39 per month for a single location for the ‘Track’ plan which is their basic-level plan built for local rank tracking and reporting. This is the plan you can use for base-level analytics and competitor insights as well.

Source: Brightlocal Pricing Page

‍
